title: AdditionalStores are ignored with buildah in a container
body:
**Description**

/var/lib/containers/storage is bind mounted as /var/lib/shared. With quay.io/buildah/upstream:latest, "buildah images" does not list the existing images available on the node. On the same node, when the image is changed to quay.io/buildah/stable:latest, it works as expected


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Download couple of images on the host system 
2. Use the below command 
   podman run  --security-opt label=disable --security-opt seccomp=/usr/share/containers/seccomp.json  --rm -it --device /dev/fuse:rw -v /var/tmp/test/Dockerfile:/Dockerfile:Z -v /var/lib/containers/storage:/var/lib/shared  quay.io/buildah/upstream:latest bash
3. Execute buildah images


**Describe the results you received:**

With quay.io/buildah/upstream
*****************************

[root@test ~]# podman run  --security-opt label=disable --security-opt seccomp=/usr/share/containers/seccomp.json  --rm -it --device /dev/fuse:rw -v /var/tmp/test/Dockerfile:/Dockerfile:Z -v /var/lib/containers/storage:/var/lib/shared  quay.io/buildah/upstream:latest bash
[root@42f408281848 /]# buildah images
REPOSITORY   TAG   IMAGE ID   CREATED   SIZE
[root@42f408281848 /]# buildah version
Version:         1.13.0-dev
Go Version:      go1.13.5
Image Spec:      1.0.1-dev
Runtime Spec:    1.0.1-dev
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  v0.7.1
image Version:   5.1.0
Git Commit:      9588a829
Built:           Fri Dec 20 20:02:53 2019
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
[root@42f408281848 /]# buildah --log-level=debug image
--
-- snip from the debug output
--
DEBU [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU backingFs=overlayfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 
REPOSITORY   TAG   IMAGE ID   CREATED   SIZE

With quay.io/buildah/stable
***************************

[root@test ~]# podman run  --security-opt label=disable --security-opt seccomp=/usr/share/containers/seccomp.json  --rm -it --device /dev/fuse:rw -v /var/tmp/test/Dockerfile:/Dockerfile:Z -v /var/lib/containers/storage:/var/lib/shared  quay.io/buildah/stable:latest bash
[root@5f11ee0bb467 /]# buildah images
REPOSITORY                         TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE      R/O
docker.io/library/alpine           latest   cc0abc535e36   12 days ago   5.86 MB   true
quay.io/buildah/upstream           latest   4d4f74aa0853   2 weeks ago   728 MB    true
quay.io/buildah/stable             latest   6f81096d0a50   2 weeks ago   495 MB    true
registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7   latest   55a1f4beaf8e   3 weeks ago   215 MB    true
docker.io/fedora/apache            latest   c786010769a8   2 years ago   410 MB    true
[root@5f11ee0bb467 /]# buildah --log-level=debug images
--
-- We can see the additional imagestore being read
--
_=/usr/bin/buildah TMPDIR=/var/tmp _CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED=1], UID map [{ContainerID:0 HostID:0 Size:4294967295}], and GID map [{ContainerID:0 HostID:0 Size:4294967295}] 
DEBU [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay" 
DEBU overlay: imagestore=/var/lib/shared          
DEBU overlay: mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs 
DEBU backingFs=overlayfs, projectQuotaSupported=false, useNativeDiff=false, usingMetacopy=false 

The above commands were executed on a RHEL 8.1 node with podman-1.4.2-6.module+el8.1.0+4830+f49150d7.x86_64


**Describe the results you expected:**

buildah images should read the additional imagestore and list the images



**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Use the container image quay.io/buildah/upstream
# buildah version
Version:         1.13.0-dev
Go Version:      go1.13.5
Image Spec:      1.0.1-dev
Runtime Spec:    1.0.1-dev
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  v0.7.1
image Version:   5.1.0
Git Commit:      9588a829
Built:           Fri Dec 20 20:02:53 2019
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64


**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
Red Hat Enterprise Linux release 8.1 (Ootpa)
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
4.18.0-147.3.1.el8_1.x86_64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
storage.conf from quay.io/buildah/upstream

[storage]
driver = "overlay"
runroot = "/var/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"
[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = [
"/var/lib/shared",
]

size = ""
mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
override_kernel_check = "true"
mountopt = "nodev,metacopy=on"
[storage.options.thinpool]
ostree_repo = ""
skip_mount_home = "false"
```
